reviews.review_msg: ah, the dude is awesome.  extremely good educator.  knows his stuff but more importantly, knows how to break it down and think like a student.  all materials relevant.  very good in person/tutorials.  fun, interested and easy to learn from.  really loved him!!!

(Online course). Barely regards questions when asking them, provides poor grades with very little feedback (all of which is not constructive), and has a slow response time for online questions. Very frustrating.
